svg.title: Stage 4 HFT Pipeline: Signal Engine to OMS
svg.desc: Flowchart showing the boundary between the read-only signal engine world and the stateful OMS world, connected by an intent queue with pre-trade risk checks.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What does the enriched order book contain in HFT?')
sendPrompt('What quantitative models does the signal engine use in HFT?')
sendPrompt('What is order flow imbalance as a microstructure signal?')
sendPrompt('How does statistical arbitrage work as an HFT signal?')
sendPrompt('How is neural network inference used in HFT signal engines?')
sendPrompt('What fields does an order intent record contain in HFT?')
sendPrompt('What is the role of the OMS thread in HFT?')
sendPrompt('What pre-trade risk checks does an HFT OMS enforce?')
sendPrompt('What happens after an order passes pre-trade risk checks in HFT?')
sendPrompt('How does the OMS communicate with the exchange in HFT?')
sendPrompt('How are rejected orders logged and audited in HFT systems?')
